channel.title: Notes on Mike Ball
channel.description: Recent content in Notes on Mike Ball

item.title: Collecting Paginated HTTP API Response Data Using JavaScript's async/await
item.description: Collect all pages of data from a paginated HTTP API in JavaScript using async/await.

item.title: Setting Up Postgres on Mac OSX with Homebrew
item.description: My notes on getting postgres running on Mac OS via a homebrew installation.

item.title: Basic Command Line Tools
item.description: Some beginner's notes; collected for a recently-hired junior developer.

item.title: CSS3: An All-CSS, Image-less Play Button
item.description: I wondered if it could be done; here's a quick and dirty technique.

item.title: How to Make Testable Private Methods in JavaScript
item.description: A controversial technique for writing unit tests against private methods.

item.title: JavaScript Design Patterns
item.description: My notes on Addy Osmani's JavaScript design patterns ebook.

item.title: Simplified Find/Replace from the Command Line
item.description: An overview of a quick bash function I recently wrote.

item.title: How to Exclude Files from SVN Commits
item.description: A bash function for working around a Subversion annoyance.

item.title: Basic Overview of the Surround Plugin for Vim
item.description: My notes on using Vim's surround plugin.
